name: あげく
description: Used to express the final result of a long process, often with negative connotations; 'to end up', 'in the end', 'finally after all'

name: あるいは
description: Used to present alternatives or possibilities; 'or', 'either', 'maybe', 'perhaps', 'possibly'

name: ばかり
description: Used to indicate approximation or rough quantity; 'about', 'approximately'

name: ばかりだ
description: Expresses that something continues to go in a negative direction; 'continue to', 'keep getting worse'

name: ばかりか
description: Used to add emphasis by stating 'not only... but also'; 'not only but also', 'as well as'

name: ばかりに
description: Expresses that something happened simply because of a particular reason; 'simply because', 'on account of'

name: ちなみに
description: Used to add related information or change topics; 'by the way', 'incidentally'

name: ちっとも～ない
description: Strong negative expression meaning 'not at all', 'not in the least'

name: だけあって
description: Expresses that something is as expected given the circumstances; 'being the case', 'precisely because'

name: だけましだ
description: Expresses that something is better than it could be; 'it's better than', 'should feel grateful for'

name: だけに
description: Expresses that something is natural or expected given the circumstances; 'being the case', 'precisely because'

name: だけのことはある
description: Expresses that something is as expected or deserved; 'as expected of', 'not for nothing'

name: だけは
description: Expresses doing everything possible within one's ability; 'to do all that one can'

name: だって
description: Casual expression meaning 'because', 'but', 'after all', 'even', 'too'

name: でしかない
description: Expresses limitation or dismissal; 'merely', 'nothing but', 'no more than'

name: どころではない
description: Expresses that it's not the time or situation for something; 'not the time for', 'far from'

name: どころか
description: Expresses the opposite of what might be expected; 'far from', 'anything but', 'let alone'

name: どうやら
description: Expresses uncertainty or conjecture based on evidence; 'apparently', 'seems like', 'somehow'

name: どうせ
description: Expresses resignation or inevitability; 'anyhow', 'in any case', 'at any rate'

name: 得ない
description: Expresses inability or impossibility; 'unable to', 'cannot', 'it is not possible to'

name: 得る
description: Expresses possibility or ability; 'can', 'to be able to', 'is possible to'

name: 再び
description: Formal expression meaning 'again', 'once more'

name: ふうに
description: Expresses manner or way of doing something; 'this way', 'that way', 'in such a way', 'how'

name: がきっかけで
description: Expresses the trigger or opportunity that led to something; 'as a result of', 'taking advantage of'

name: げ
description: Suffix expressing appearance or seeming; 'looks like', 'seems like', 'appears to'

name: 逆に
description: Expresses contrast or opposite situation; 'conversely', 'on the contrary'

name: 反面
description: Expresses contrast while acknowledging both sides; 'while', 'although', 'on the other hand'

name: 果たして
description: Expresses confirmation of expectation or doubt; 'as was expected', 'sure enough', 'really'

name: 一応
description: Expresses doing something tentatively or provisionally; 'more or less', 'pretty much', 'roughly'

name: 以外
description: Expresses exclusion; 'with the exception of', 'excepting'

name: 以上に
description: Expresses exceeding expectations or degree; 'more than', 'not less than', 'beyond'

name: 以上は
description: Expresses logical consequence; 'because', 'since', 'seeing that'

name: いきなり
description: Expresses sudden action without warning; 'abruptly', 'suddenly', 'all of a sudden'

name: 一気に
description: Expresses doing something all at once without interruption; 'in one go', 'without stopping', 'all at once'

name: 一方で
description: Expresses contrast between two situations; 'on one hand', 'on the other hand'

name: いわゆる
description: Used to introduce a commonly known term or concept; 'what is called', 'as it is called', 'so-called'

name: いよいよ
description: Expresses that something has finally reached a climactic point; 'at last', 'finally', 'beyond doubt'

name: 上
description: Expresses doing something from a particular standpoint or for a purpose; 'for the sake of', 'from the standpoint of'

name: かのように
description: Expresses similarity or comparison; 'as if', 'just like'

name: かと思ったら
description: Expresses that something happens immediately after something else; 'just when', 'no sooner than'

name: か～ないかのうちに
description: Expresses that something happens just as or right after another action begins, emphasizing the immediate timing

name: かえって
description: Indicates that something happens contrary to expectations or that the opposite result occurs

name: 限り
description: Expresses 'as long as' or 'while something is the case', indicating a condition or limitation

name: 甲斐がある
description: Expresses that something is worth the effort or that one's efforts are rewarded

name: かねない
description: Expresses that someone might do something undesirable or that there's a possibility of something bad happening

name: かねる
description: Expresses inability to do something, often due to difficulty or reluctance

name: から言うと
description: Expresses 'in terms of' or 'from the point of view of', indicating a perspective or standpoint

name: からこそ
description: Emphasizes that something happens precisely because of a certain reason or condition

name: から見ると
description: Expresses 'from the point of view of' or 'judging from', indicating a perspective for evaluation

name: からには
description: Expresses 'now that' or 'since', indicating that because a condition exists, a certain action should follow

name: からして
description: Expresses 'judging from' or 'based on', often used to make generalizations from specific examples

name: からすると
description: Expresses 'judging from' or 'considering', used to make conclusions based on evidence

name: からと言って
description: Expresses 'just because' or 'even if', indicating that one thing doesn't necessarily lead to another

name: っこない
description: Expresses that there's no chance of something happening or that something is definitely not possible

name: ことだ
description: Used to give suggestions or advice, expressing what someone should do

name: ことだから
description: Expresses 'because' or 'since', often used when the reason is well-known or obvious

name: ことか
description: Expresses strong emotion or emphasis, meaning 'how...!' or 'what...!' in exclamatory sentences

name: ことなく
description: Expresses doing something without doing another action even once, meaning 'without doing'

name: ことに
description: Used to emphasize the speaker's feelings or emotions about a situation

name: ことにはならない
description: Expresses that just because one thing is true doesn't mean another thing follows

name: くせして
description: Expresses criticism or complaint, meaning 'although' or 'despite the fact that'

name: まだしも
description: Expresses that something is relatively better or more acceptable compared to alternatives

name: まい
description: Expresses negative volition or intention, meaning 'will not' or 'intend not to'

name: ままに
description: Expresses doing something as one pleases or according to one's desires or circumstances

name: 全く～ない
description: Emphasizes complete negation, meaning 'not at all' or 'absolutely not'

name: もかまわず
description: Expresses doing something without caring about or worrying about consequences

name: も当然だ
description: Expresses that something is only natural or no wonder, indicating an expected result

name: もの / もん
description: Used to express reasons, excuses, or dissatisfaction, often in casual speech

name: ものだ
description: Used to describe feelings, express memories, or state general truths about life

name: ものだから
description: Expresses the reason for something, meaning 'so' or 'therefore'

name: ものではない
description: Expresses that someone shouldn't do something or that something is impossible

name: ものがある
description: Expresses that there is such a thing or that something is the case

name: ものか / もんか
description: Expresses strong denial or rejection, meaning 'as if' or 'there's no way'

name: ものなら
description: Expresses a conditional meaning 'if A is possible, then B', often with doubt about possibility

name: ものの
description: Expresses contrast meaning 'but', 'although', or 'even though'

name: もっとも
description: Expresses concession or contrast, meaning 'but then', 'although', or 'though'

name: もう少しで
description: Expresses that something almost happened or was close to happening

name: ないではいられない
description: Expresses that one can't help but feel or do something, indicating compulsion

name: ないことには～ない
description: Expresses that unless you do something, another thing won't happen

name: 中を /中では
description: Expresses 'in', 'on', 'in the midst of', 'when', or 'while' something is happening

name: なくはない
description: Double negative expressing that something is not entirely untrue or impossible; 'it's not that...' or 'I may...'

name: なくて済む
description: Expresses getting by without doing something or being able to avoid doing something

name: 何も～ない
description: Emphasizes complete negation; 'nothing at all' or 'not ~ at all'

name: なお
description: Formal conjunction meaning 'still', 'yet', 'furthermore', or 'in addition'

name: ねばならない
description: Classical/formal expression of obligation meaning 'must do' or 'have to do'

name: にあたって
description: Formal expression meaning 'at the time of' or 'on the occasion of' when doing something important

name: にほかならない
description: Emphatic expression meaning 'nothing but', 'none other than', or 'exactly'

name: に限らず
description: Means 'not limited to', 'not just', or 'not only... but also'

name: に限る
description: Expresses that something is the best option; 'nothing is better than' or 'is best'

name: に限って
description: Means 'only' or 'in particular', often used when something happens specifically in certain cases

name: に関わらず
description: Formal expression meaning 'regardless of', 'in spite of', or 'irrespective of'

name: に関わる
description: Means 'to relate to', 'to have to do with', or 'to be involved in'

name: に決まっている
description: Expresses strong certainty; 'certainly', 'I'm sure that', or 'it must be'

name: に越したことはない
description: Means 'it's best that', 'nothing is better than', expressing the most desirable option

name: に応えて
description: Means 'in response to' or 'meeting (expectations/demands)'

name: に加えて
description: Means 'in addition to', 'besides', or 'on top of'

name: に基づいて
description: Formal expression meaning 'based on', 'on the basis of', or 'according to'

name: に向かって
description: Means 'toward', 'facing', or 'heading to' (direction or target)

name: に応じて
description: Means 'depending on', 'in accordance with', or 'according to'

name: に際して
description: Formal expression meaning 'on the occasion of', 'at the time of', or 'when'

name: に先立ち
description: Formal expression meaning 'before', 'prior to', or 'in advance of'

name: にせよ/にしろ
description: Means 'even if', 'regardless', or 'whether... or', expressing concession

name: にしろ～にしろ
description: Means 'whether... or...', presenting alternatives or choices

name: にしたら
description: Means 'from one's perspective', 'as far as... is concerned', or 'for...'

name: にしても
description: Means 'even if', 'regardless of whether', or 'no matter'

name: に沿って
description: Means 'along with', 'in accordance with', or 'following'

name: に相違ない
description: Formal expression meaning 'without a doubt', 'certain', or 'sure'

name: に過ぎない
description: Means 'no more than', 'just', 'merely', or 'only', expressing limitation

name: に伴って
description: Means 'as', 'due to', 'with', 'along with', or 'following', expressing accompaniment or consequence

name: につけ
description: Means 'every time', 'whenever', 'as', or 'whether', often used with emotions or reactions

name: につき
description: Formal expression meaning 'due to', 'because of', 'per', or 'each'

name: にわたって
description: Means 'throughout', 'over a period of', or 'across', expressing extent in time or space

name: にも関わらず
description: Formal expression meaning 'despite', 'in spite of', or 'nevertheless'

name: にて
description: Formal/classical particle meaning 'in', 'at', 'with', or 'by', used in formal contexts

name: のももっともだ
description: Means 'no wonder', 'it's only natural', or 'it's understandable', expressing that something is reasonable

name: の下で
description: Means 'under', 'with', or 'in the context of', expressing circumstances or conditions

name: の上では
description: Means 'according to', 'from the viewpoint of', or 'in terms of'

name: のみ
description: Formal/literary expression meaning 'only', 'nothing but', more emphatic than だけ

name: のみならず
description: Formal expression meaning 'not only', 'besides', or 'as well as'

name: ぬ
description: Classical/literary negative verb conjugation, equivalent to modern ない

name: 抜きにして
description: Express 'without' or 'leaving out' something; excluding a particular element from consideration

name: 抜く
description: Express doing something completely from beginning to end; thoroughly or exhaustively

name: を契機に
description: Express using something as a good opportunity or chance to do something else

name: をめぐって
description: Express 'concerning' or 'in regard to' a particular topic or issue

name: をもとに
description: Express 'based on' or 'derived from' something; building upon existing information

name: を除いて
description: Express 'except' or 'with the exception of'; excluding something from a group

name: を問わず
description: Express 'regardless of' or 'irrespective of'; no matter what the condition is

name: お～願う
description: Polite request form meaning 'please do' or 'could you please'; honorific request pattern

name: おまけに
description: Express 'to make matters worse' or 'what's more'; adding negative information

name: 恐らく
description: Express probability or likelihood; 'perhaps', 'likely', 'probably', or 'I dare say'

name: 恐れがある
description: Express concern or fear that something negative might happen; 'it is feared that'

name: 及び
description: Formal conjunction meaning 'and' or 'as well as'; used in written or formal contexts

name: ろくに～ない
description: Express 'not well', 'not enough', or 'improperly'; inadequate performance or condition

name: 幸いなことに
description: Express 'fortunately', 'luckily', or 'thankfully'; indicating a positive outcome

name: せいか
description: Express 'perhaps because' or uncertainty about a cause; tentative attribution

name: せっかく
description: Express 'especially' or appreciation for someone's trouble; emphasizing effort or opportunity

name: せめて
description: Express 'at least' or 'at most'; indicating minimum expectation or desire

name: 次第
description: Express 'as soon as' or 'dependent upon'; immediate action or dependency

name: 次第で
description: Express 'depending on' or conditional relationship; outcome varies based on circumstances

name: 次第に
description: Express 'gradually', 'in sequence', or 'in order'; progressive change over time

name: しかも
description: Express 'moreover', 'furthermore', or 'what's more'; adding emphasis to additional information

name: その上
description: Express 'besides', 'in addition', or 'furthermore'; adding more information

name: それなのに
description: Express 'and yet', 'despite this', or 'but even so'; contrast with expectation

name: それなら
description: Express 'if that's the case' or 'if so'; conditional response to previous statement

name: それにしても
description: Express 'nevertheless', 'at any rate', or 'even so'; acknowledging while contrasting

name: そう言えば
description: Express 'come to think of it' or sudden realization; remembering something relevant

name: そうすると
description: Express 'having done that' or 'if that is done'; consequence of an action

name: 末に
description: Express 'finally', 'after', or 'at the end'; conclusion after a process or time

name: 少しも～ない
description: Express 'not one bit' or 'not even a little'; complete negation with emphasis

name: 少なくとも
description: Express 'at least'; indicating minimum quantity, degree, or expectation

name: 直ちに
description: Express 'at once', 'immediately', or 'directly'; urgent or immediate action

name: たまえ
description: Imperative form meaning 'do'; ordering somebody to do something (masculine, authoritative)

name: てばかりはいられない
description: Express 'can't keep doing' something; inability to continue the same action

name: てでも
description: Express 'even if I have to' or 'by all means'; determination despite difficulty

name: て以来
description: Express 'since' or 'henceforth'; continuous state from a specific point in time

name: ていては
description: Express 'if one keeps doing' something; conditional about continuing an action

name: てこそ
description: Express 'now that' or 'since something happened'; emphasis on prerequisite condition

name: てまで
description: Express 'even' or 'will go so far as to'; extreme measures or unexpected extent

name: てならない
description: Express 'can't help but' or extreme feeling; uncontrollable emotion or sensation

name: てたまらない
description: Express 'can't help but' or extreme feeling; unbearable or overwhelming sensation

name: て当然だ
description: Expresses that something is natural, expected, or as a matter of course

name: ては / では
description: Expresses repetitive actions or conditional situations meaning 'whenever' or 'if'

name: てはいられない
description: Expresses that one cannot afford to do something or is unable to continue doing it

name: てはならない
description: Strong prohibition expressing 'must not', 'cannot', or 'should not'

name: ては～ては
description: Expresses repetitive situations or actions, often with alternating states

name: と同時に
description: Expresses simultaneous actions or events meaning 'at the same time as' or 'while'

name: といった
description: Used to give examples meaning 'like', 'such as', or 'for instance'

name: というふうに
description: Expresses manner or method meaning 'in such a way that' or 'like this'

name: ということは
description: Used to explain or rephrase meaning 'that is to say', 'in other words', or 'this means'

name: というものだ
description: Expresses the nature or essence of something meaning 'something like' or 'something called'

name: というものではない
description: Expresses that there is no guarantee or certainty about something

name: と考えられる
description: Expresses that something is conceivable or can be thought of as true

name: とか（で）
description: Expresses hearsay or indirect information meaning 'I heard that'

name: とっくに
description: Expresses that something happened long ago or already, emphasizing the passage of time

name: ところだった
description: Expresses that one was just about to do something when interrupted

name: ところに
description: Expresses timing meaning 'at the time when' or 'just as I was'

name: ところを見ると
description: Expresses judgment based on observation meaning 'judging from' or 'seeing that'

name: とも
description: Expresses concession meaning 'even if', 'no matter', or 'though'

name: として～ない
description: Expresses complete absence meaning 'not at all' or 'there is not even one'

name: としても
description: Expresses assumption or concession meaning 'assuming' or 'even if'

name: つつ
description: Formal expression meaning 'while', 'even though', or 'despite'

name: つつある
description: Expresses ongoing process or gradual change meaning 'to be doing' or 'in the process of'

name: 上は
description: Expresses condition or situation meaning 'now that', 'since', or 'as long as'

name: はもとより
description: Expresses inclusion meaning 'also', 'let alone', or 'from the beginning'

name: はともかく
description: Expresses setting aside one thing to focus on another meaning 'anyhow' or 'regardless'

name: わずかに
description: Expresses small degree or amount meaning 'slightly', 'only', 'barely', or 'narrowly'

name: やがて
description: Expresses future timing meaning 'before long', 'soon', 'almost', or 'eventually'

name: やら～やら
description: Lists examples or expresses uncertainty meaning 'such things as A and B' or 'and so on'

name: よほど / よっぽど
description: Expresses high degree meaning 'very', 'greatly', 'much', or 'to a large extent'

name: より [2]
description: Indicates starting point in time, place, or person meaning 'from'

name: よりほかない
description: Expresses having no choice or alternative meaning 'to have no choice but'

name: ようでは
description: Expresses negative consequence meaning 'if' (leading to bad result)

name: ようではないか
description: Expresses suggestion or invitation meaning 'let's do' or 'why don't we'

name: ようか～まいか
description: Expresses indecision or consideration of options meaning 'whether or not'

name: 要するに
description: Expresses summary or conclusion meaning 'in short', 'in a word', or 'to sum up'

name: ざるを得ない
description: Formal expression meaning 'cannot help doing' or 'have no choice but to'

name: ずに済む
description: Expresses getting by without doing something or avoiding an action
